Title: User Registration Success Path
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Register a new user with valid credentials
3. Verify that the user is redirected to the homepage
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and redirected to the homepage.

Title: User Registration Failure Path
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Attempt to register a new user with invalid credentials
3. Verify that the user is prompted to create a new account
Expected Result: User is prompted to create a new account due to invalid credentials.

Title: Navigate to Homepage via Menu
Test Steps:
1. Click on the sidebar menu
2. Click on 'Homepage'
3. Verify that the homepage is displayed
Expected Result: Homepage is displayed after clicking on 'Homepage'.

Title: Navigate to My Reports via Menu
Test Steps:
1. Click on the sidebar menu
2. Click on 'Le mie segnalazioni'
3. Verify that the 'My Reports' section is displayed
Expected Result: 'My Reports' section is displayed after clicking on 'Le mie segnalazioni'.

Title: Navigate to Settings via Menu
Test Steps:
1. Click on the sidebar menu
2. Click on 'Impostazioni'
3. Verify that the settings page is displayed
Expected Result: Settings page is displayed after clicking on 'Impostazioni'.

Title: Add Report with Correct Fields
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Add Alert' in the sidebar menu
2. Click 'Add Category'
3. Verify that the first four fields are correctly filled
4. Click the green button to submit the report
5. Verify that the report is added successfully
Expected Result: Report is added successfully after filling the first four fields correctly.

Title: Add Report with Incorrect Fields
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Add Alert' in the sidebar menu
2. Click 'Add Category'
3. Verify that the first four fields are incorrectly filled
4. Click the green button to submit the report
5. Verify that the user is prompted to correct the fields
6. Correct the fields and try submitting again
7. Verify that the report is added successfully
Expected Result: User is prompted to correct the fields and the report is added successfully after correcting the fields.

Title: View All Alerts
Test Steps:
1. Click 'View Alerts' in the sidebar menu
2. Verify that all alerts are displayed
3. Click on one alert
4. Verify that the detailed information of the selected alert is displayed
Expected Result: Detailed information of the selected alert is displayed after clicking on it.

Title: Navigate to Dwellings Screen from Profile
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the sidebar menu
2. Click on the blue house icon
3. Verify that the dwellings screen is displayed
Expected Result: Dwellings screen is displayed after clicking on the blue house icon.

Title: Validate Profile Fields and Save Changes
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the sidebar menu
2. Verify that the profile page is displayed
3. Click on the blue house icon
4. Verify that the dwellings screen is displayed
5. Verify that the fields are incomplete
6. Correct the fields
7. Click 'Save changes'
8. Verify that the changes are saved successfully
Expected Result: Changes are saved successfully after correcting the fields.

Title: Validate Profile Fields and Discard Changes
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the sidebar menu
2. Verify that the profile page is displayed
3. Click on the blue house icon
4. Verify that the dwellings screen is displayed
5. Verify that the fields are incomplete
6. Correct the fields
7. Click 'Discard changes'
8. Verify that the changes are discarded
Expected Result: Changes are discarded after clicking 'Discard changes'.

Title: Validate Profile Fields and Correct Data
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the sidebar menu
2. Verify that the profile page is displayed
3. Click on the blue house icon
4. Verify that the dwellings screen is displayed
5. Verify that the fields are incomplete
6. Correct the fields
7. Click 'Save changes'
8. Verify that the changes are saved successfully
9. Verify that the fields are now complete
Expected Result: Changes are saved successfully and fields are now complete after correcting the fields.

Title: Validate Profile Fields and Fail Validation
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the sidebar menu
2. Verify that the profile page is displayed
3. Click on the blue house icon
4. Verify that the dwellings screen is displayed
5. Verify that the fields are incomplete
6. Try to save changes without correcting the fields
7. Verify that the validation fails
Expected Result: Validation fails and user is prompted to correct the fields.

Title: Validate Profile Fields and Correct Data with Loop
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the sidebar menu
2. Verify that the profile page is displayed
3. Click on the blue house icon
4. Verify that the dwellings screen is displayed
5. Verify that the fields are incomplete
6. Correct the fields
7. Click 'Save changes'
8. Verify that the changes are saved successfully
9. Verify that the fields are now complete
10. Try to save changes again without further corrections
11. Verify that the validation fails and user is prompted to correct the fields
12. Correct the fields again
13. Click 'Save changes'
14. Verify that the changes are saved successfully
Expected Result: Changes are saved successfully after correcting the fields twice.

Title: Validate Profile Fields and Discard Changes with Loop
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the sidebar menu
2. Verify that the profile page is displayed
3. Click on the blue house icon
4. Verify that the dwellings screen is displayed
5. Verify that the fields are incomplete
6. Correct the fields
7. Click 'Discard changes'
8. Verify that the changes are discarded
9. Verify that the fields are still incomplete
10. Try to save changes without further corrections
11. Verify that the validation fails and user is prompted to correct the fields
12. Correct the fields again
13. Click 'Discard changes'
14. Verify that the changes are discarded
15. Verify that the fields are still incomplete
Expected Result: Changes are discarded successfully after discarding twice.
